title: Fix the slow admission webhook
scenario:
On-call gets paged: pod creation in the `payments` namespace is timing out with `context deadline exceeded`. The SRE traces it to `payments-validator`, a ValidatingWebhookConfiguration whose webhook server occasionally takes 20–25 s to respond (cold starts + GC). The webhook has two problems:

1. `timeoutSeconds: 30` — the API server waits a full 30 s before failing. Every slow webhook call blocks the admission pipeline for that entire window.
2. No `namespaceSelector` — the webhook intercepts pods in **all** namespaces, including `kube-system`. This adds latency to every cluster admission, not just payments traffic.

Fix both issues: reduce `timeoutSeconds` to `5` and add a `namespaceSelector` that restricts the webhook to namespaces labelled `team: payments`.
starterYaml:
apiVersion: admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1
kind: ValidatingWebhookConfiguration
metadata:
  name: payments-validator
webhooks:
- name: validate.payments.kubeforge.io
  admissionReviewVersions: ["v1"]
  clientConfig:
    service:
      name: payments-webhook
      namespace: payments
      path: /validate
  rules:
  - apiGroups: ["apps", ""]
    apiVersions: ["v1"]
    resources: ["pods", "deployments"]
    operations: ["CREATE", "UPDATE"]
  failurePolicy: Fail
  timeoutSeconds: 30
  sideEffects: None

hints.text: Two fixes needed: lower `timeoutSeconds` and add `namespaceSelector` under the webhook entry (same level as `failurePolicy`).
`timeoutSeconds: 30` means the API server blocks for 30 s on every slow call. Kubernetes recommends ≤ 5 s for interactive admission. Setting it to `5` causes fast-fail instead of a 30 s stall.

Add `namespaceSelector:\n  matchLabels:\n    team: payments` at the same indentation level as `failurePolicy`. This tells the API server to only send admission requests for namespaces that have the `team: payments` label.

solution:
apiVersion: admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1
kind: ValidatingWebhookConfiguration
metadata:
  name: payments-validator
webhooks:
- name: validate.payments.kubeforge.io
  admissionReviewVersions: ["v1"]
  clientConfig:
    service:
      name: payments-webhook
      namespace: payments
      path: /validate
  rules:
  - apiGroups: ["apps", ""]
    apiVersions: ["v1"]
    resources: ["pods", "deployments"]
    operations: ["CREATE", "UPDATE"]
  namespaceSelector:
    matchLabels:
      team: payments
  failurePolicy: Fail
  timeoutSeconds: 5
  sideEffects: None
